== Notes for [[Item:Q99630|Q99630]] ==

He was previously designated as kohen, but see discussion:- https://www.geni.com/discussions/215660 For him to be a descendant of a Bostnai, he is neither kohen nor levi nor this profile:- https://he.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D7%97%D7%A0%D7%99%D7%A0%D7%90%D7%99_%D7%9B%D7%94%D7%A0%D7%90_%D7%91%D7%9F_%D7%94%D7%95%D7%A0%D7%90_%D7%92%D7%90%D7%95%D7%9F

The profiles ought to be checked against the sources to ensure that he really is a son here.

----

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD727F7A1EFBBFA9822EF79916CDFD1
geni:6000000000804284678

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
